subject: Final chance before the Indiana Digital Learning Grant deadline
previewText: The grant closes April 6. Join today’s walkthrough to see how SchoolAI aligns with IDOE requirements and supports your application.
module-4-0-0:
Hi {{ personalization_token('contact.firstname', 'fellow educator') }},

 

Are you looking for ways to bring AI-powered learning tools to your district using the Indiana Digital Learning Grant? This is your last chance to join our walkthrough session.

 

SchoolAI + the Indiana Digital Learning Grant: Supporting Your Application

📅 Today | March 23 | 4:00 - 5:00 PM ET

 

We'll cover:

  • How SchoolAI fits the IDOE AI vendor requirements
  • How districts use AI to help literacy, math, and student pathways
  • How teachers get real-time insight into student learning
  • Practical insights from a district using SchoolAI

 

Register here: [RSVP]

 

👉 Can't make it to the webinar? Schedule time with us to walk through the application process!

 

Districts can apply for up to $50,000. The grant application deadline is April 6.

 

Hope to see you there.

 

The SchoolAI Team
